title: PushUrgency::Unknown missing serde round-trip caveat
description: PushUrgency::Unknown uses #[serde(other)] but its doc comment says only 'Unrecognized urgency value.' with no warning that serializing it emits the literal string "unknown" rather than preserving the original wire value. Every other #[serde(other)] Unknown variant in the file carries the caveat 'If serialized, produces the literal string "unknown" — not the original wire value.' PushUrgency is particularly exposed because PushUrgency appears in ChatPushConfig, which clients actively construct (not just deserialize). A contributor who reads an unknown urgency from the server and echoes it back via PushUrgency::Unknown will silently send "unknown" to the server instead of the original string. Fix: add the standard caveat to the Unknown variant doc comment.
